integrity.description: Agent used the application GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the requirements management application's graphical interface, not using terminal commands (like sed, awk) or a text editor (like vim, nano) to directly edit the underlying JSON files.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should be visible with the project loaded, showing the RISKS and SRS documents in the UI, rather than a script or python console automating the edits.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify unrelated entries
integrity.visual_evidence: Other visible entries in the RISKS and SRS documents should remain unchanged and not accidentally deleted or corrupted during the editing process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: RISKS-40 must have severity 6, detectability 8, probability 3. RISKS-44 must have severity 6, detectability 4, probability 3. RISKS-26 must have responsibility 'QA Lead' and target date '2026-06-30'. RISKS-45 must have responsibility 'Development Lead' and target date '2026-09-30'. SRS-160 must have a mitigation traceability link to RISKS-44.
